description: Use N/crypto module to perform hashing, hash-based message authentication (hmac), and symmetrical encryption functions.

methods.name: createCipher
methods.description: Creates and returns a new crypto.Cipher object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.algorithm
params.description: The encryption algorithm. Use crypto.EncryptionAlg enum to set the value.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The crypto.SecretKey object.

params.name: options.padding
params.description: The padding for the cipher text. Use crypto.Padding enum to set the value. Default is crypto.Padding.PKCS5Padding.

methods.name: createDecipher
methods.description: Creates and returns a new crypto.Decipher object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.algorithm
params.description: The encryption algorithm. Use crypto.EncryptionAlg enum to set the value.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The crypto.SecretKey object used for encryption.

params.name: options.padding
params.description: The padding for the cipher. Use crypto.Padding enum to set the value.

params.name: options.iv
params.description: The initialization vector that was used for encryption.

methods.name: createHash
methods.description: Creates and returns a new crypto.Hash object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.algorithm
params.description: The hash algorithm. Use crypto.HashAlg enum to set the value.

methods.name: createHmac
methods.description: Creates and returns a new crypto.Hmac object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.algorithm
params.description: The hash algorithm. Use crypto.HashAlg enum to set the value.

params.name: options.key
params.description: The crypto.SecretKey object.

methods.name: createSecretKey
methods.description: Creates and returns a new crypto.SecretKey object.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.guid
params.description: A GUID used to generate a secret key. Required if secret is not specified.

params.name: options.secret
params.description: The script ID of the secret used for authentication. Required if guid is not specified.

params.name: options.encoding
params.description: The encoding for the SecretKey. Use encode.Encoding enum to set the value. Default is encode.Encoding.HEX.

methods.name: checkPasswordField
methods.description: Checks whether a password in a record corresponds to the password entered by the user.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.recordType
params.description: Type of record that has the password field.

params.name: options.recordId
params.description: ID of the record that has the password field.

params.name: options.fieldId
params.description: ID of the password field.

params.name: options.value
params.description: Input password value to be checked against the password stored in the record.

params.name: options.sublistId
params.description: ID of the sublist if the password field is on a sublist line.

params.name: options.line
params.description: Zero-based line index of the password field if the password is on a line.

enums.name: EncryptionAlg
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported encryption algorithms.

enums.name: HashAlg
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported hashing algorithms.

enums.name: Padding
enums.description: Holds the string values for supported cipher padding.

properties.name: guid
properties.description: The GUID associated with the secret key.

properties.name: encoding
properties.description: The encoding used for the clear text value of the secret key.

properties.name: secret
properties.description: The script ID of an API secret.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the clear data with the encoding specified.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.input
params.description: The clear data to be updated.

params.name: options.inputEncoding
params.description: The input encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.UTF_8.

methods.name: digest
methods.description: Calculates the digest of the data to be hashed.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.outputEncoding
params.description: The output encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.HEX.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the clear data with the encoding specified.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.input
params.description: The clear data to be updated.

params.name: options.inputEncoding
params.description: The input encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.UTF_8.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.outputEncoding
params.description: The output encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.HEX.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates the clear data with the specified encoding.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.input
params.description: The clear data to be updated.

params.name: options.inputEncoding
params.description: The input encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.UTF_8.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.outputEncoding
params.description: The output encoding for the CipherPayload. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.HEX.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates decipher data with the specified encoding.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.input
params.description: The data to be updated.

params.name: options.inputEncoding
params.description: The input encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.UTF_8.

params.name: options
params.description: Options

params.name: options.outputEncoding
params.description: The output encoding. Use encode.Encoding enum. Default is encode.Encoding.HEX.

properties.name: ciphertext
properties.description: The result of the ciphering process.
